articles.title: Fed chief taps Trump ally Marc Andreessen to advise on how AI reshapes work - The Washington Post
articles.description: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh named venture capitalist Marc Andreessen to co-lead a task force on AI's economic impact — a technology his firm has bet billions on.

articles.title: Fidji Simo steps down from OpenAI’s no. 2 role - TechCrunch

articles.content:
Fidji Simo, OpenAI’s No. 2 executive, is stepping down from her full-time role, the Wall Street Journal reports.

articles.title: Birdlike robot swims underwater, then flaps into flight without paddling - Tech Xplore
articles.description: Loons, gulls, puffins and petrels are some of the 100 species of birds that can both fly and swim. These diving birds can plunge into water to swim after prey, and leap back into the air to fly away.
